title: mawk
html:
mawk

File Read

mawk '//' /path/to/input-file

File Write

mawk 'BEGIN { print "DATA" > "/path/to/output-file" }'

Shell

mawk 'BEGIN {system("/bin/sh")}'
excerpt: mawk File Read mawk '//' /path/to/input-file File Write mawk 'BEGIN { print "DATA" > "/path/to/output-file" }' Shell mawk 'BEGIN {system("/bin/sh")}'
